1707590.name: Mystery Chamber Forever
1707590.description:
One day Roach invited his longtime friends, Jack, Alistair, and Magician, to visit. Jack leaned against the wall when suddenly it opened! It turned out to be a secret passage to the Mystery Chamber, and only one could enter it. Onward to adventure!



This game is a long-standing prototype of the upcoming Mystery Chamber project, which was first released in 2015. This is the final and expanded edition of the game from the series of old games "Mystery Chamber", which includes various improvements, changes in the gameplay, as well as new content.

Features of this edition

  • Major changes in levels and expansion of the game world compared to the original game;
  • Open world - explore each location, go back, find additional levels;
  • Many new objects that make the gameplay more diverse;
  • Almost completely redrawn graphics;
  • Original soundtrack;
  • Experience and level system;
  • Inventory - collect items that may come in handy in battle;
  • Workbench - take weapons apart, get parts from them, and use them to improve the weapons themselves;
  • Turn based battles with opponents
  • Over 70 weapons
  • Challenges - new game mode, in which you have to prove yourself somehow
  • Level Editor, in which almost all objects of the game are available;
  • Support for skins, which are created by the game's community;
  • Support for resource packs - give the game a different coloring.
